<h1 align="center">UCAS Logo Copyright Notice</h1>

<p align="center">
  <a href="LOGO_COPYRIGHT.md">中文</a> | <strong>English</strong>

## Statement

UCAS visual identity elements in this  project (`assets/vi/` directory) are **NOT covered by the MIT License**. They remain the exclusive property of the Chinese Academy of Sciences (CAS) and the University of Chinese Academy of Sciences (UCAS).

These logo files are distributed within this Typst package strictly under the "**fair use for personal study and classroom teaching**" exemption explicitly granted by the official UCAS Visual Identity Policy.

**Official Policy Reference:**
[UCAS Official Statement on Visual Identity Usage](https://onestop.ucas.edu.cn/home/info/6b9e95dc-5785-4eee-b25f-1f884698cfc3)

> *Excerpt from the official policy (translated):*
>
> 1. The copyright of the university's visual identity belongs to CAS and UCAS.
> 2. Unauthorized use without approval or authorization is considered an infringement, **except for fair use such as personal study and classroom teaching**.
> 3. UCAS reserves the right to pursue legal liabilities for non-compliance, and all consequences shall be borne by the infringer.

## Affected Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `ucas.svg` | UCAS logo |
| `ucas-emblem.svg` | UCAS emblem |
| `ucas-all-H-standard.svg` | Full horizontal logo (standard) |
| `ucas-logo-H.svg` / `ucas-logo-H-standard.svg` | Horizontal logo |
| `ucas-logo-V.svg` / `ucas-logo-V-standard.svg` | Vertical logo |

## Usage Terms for Template Users

By using this template and its included logos, you agree to comply with the official UCAS policies:

- **Permitted Use (Fair Use):** Personal study, classroom teaching, academic thesis writing, and similar non-commercial academic contexts.
- **Strictly Prohibited:** Commercial use, official publications, promotional materials, or any other use without explicit prior written authorization from UCAS.
- **Liability:** The maintainer of this Typst package provides these files solely for convenience under the fair use policy. Any downstream user who violates the official UCAS terms assumes full legal responsibility for their infringement.

## Need Authorization?

If your intended use falls outside of personal study or classroom teaching, you must contact UCAS directly for written permission via their official channels before using these visual identity assets, or remove them from your document entirely.
